Staff.title: Staff
Staff.description: Represents an authorized staff member within the school system, such as an administrator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Staff entity.

fullName.description: The full name of the staff member.

email.description: The email address of the staff member.

role.description: The assigned role of the staff member, e.g., 'Admin'.

designation.description: The job title of the staff member.

department.description: The department the staff member belongs to.

contactNumber.description: The contact phone number for the staff member.

photoUrl.description: URL to the staff passport photo.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the staff record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the staff record was last updated.

Class.title: Class
Class.description: Represents an academic class or grade level within the school.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Class entity.

name.description: The name of the class, e.g., 'Grade 1', 'SS1'.

description.description: An optional description or notes about the class.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the class record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the class record was last updated.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled in the school, storing all relevant personal and academic information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

admissionNumber.description: A unique admission number assigned to the student.

fullName.description: The full legal name of the student.

dateOfAdmission.description: The date when the student was admitted to the school.

classId.description: Reference to the Class entity the student is currently enrolled in.

parentGuardianName.description: The full name of the student's primary parent or guardian.

status.description: The current enrollment status of the student.

passportPhotoUrl.description: A URL pointing to the student's uploaded passport photograph.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the student record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the staff record was last updated.

params.name: staffId
params.description: The unique identifier for a staff member.

definition.description: Stores comprehensive records for each student.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier for a student.
